rows.label: qev090105_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome back, Yelv. How did
this round of salvaging go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0002
rows.name: Find anything nice out there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0003
rows.name:
Bupkis is what we found. Give
it over to the lady, pard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hmm? Earth-animal genome data? The lab
guys are going to have a field day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0005
rows.name:
...But I'm sorry you still haven't
found what you're looking for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0006
rows.name: Spare me! I ain't lookin' for nothin'.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0007
rows.name:
Oh! Sorry. Did I say something
wrong? I didn't mean to...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0008
rows.name:
Talking with you is like
walking a minefield, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0009
rows.name:
That's why all the other
Testament keep their distance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0010
rows.name:
Which is a shame, since you're
a total softy underneath.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0011
rows.name:
Look, we did our job, so you do yours
and make with the reward already![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0012
rows.name: Okay, okay! Here you go, grumpy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0013
rows.name:
I swear, that chick is always
gettin' up in my personal biz.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ah, well. Now that we got pocket change,
let's go knock back a cold one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0015
rows.name:
We're gonna be workin' together
a long time, you and me. Best
get to know each other.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_JNK0010
rows.name: Pry

rows.label: qev090105_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask what Eleonora meant when she said
that Yelv was "looking for something."

rows.label: qev090105_JNK0020
rows.name: Grin

rows.label: qev090105_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Yelv a cold one sounds good.

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0016
rows.name:
You and your big mouth, Eleonora... Look,
I don't wanna talk about it, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0017
rows.name:
Now come on. Let's forget all
that and go drown our sorrows.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0018
rows.name: That's what I'm talkin' about![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0019
rows.name:
Cheers to the pair that's gonna change
the course of Testamenter history![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0020
rows.name: You and me, pard! You and me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090105_MSG0021
rows.name:
We'll find every last scrap of
the White Whale, or die tryin'.[ST:wait ]
